requirement_topic.en: NBTC Type Approval — Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment (Mandatory)
requirement_topic.zh: NBTC型式批准——无线电/电信终端设备（强制）
requirement_topic.zht: NBTC型式批准——無線電/電信終端設備（強制）

summary.en: All wireless and radio communication devices — including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, and IoT products with RF capability — must obtain an NBTC (National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission) type approval certificate before import or sale in Thailand. This obligation arises under the Radio Communications Act BE 2498 and Telecommunications Business Act BE 2544. The NBTC type approval certificate number must appear on a Thai-language label affixed to the product or its packaging. CE marking, FCC certification, and SRRC approval from China are not recognised by NBTC and do not substitute for Thai type approval. An in-country authorised representative or local importer is typically required to apply for and maintain the NBTC type approval. NBTC frequency allocations are largely aligned with ITU recommendations but are enforced independently under Thai law.
summary.zh: 所有无线及无线电通信设备——包括具有射频能力的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa及物联网产品——在泰国进口或销售前，须取得NBTC（国家广播电信委员会）型式批准证书。该义务源于《无线电通信法》BE 2498及《电信业务法》BE 2544。NBTC型式批准证书编号须以泰语标注于产品或包装标签上。CE标志、FCC认证及中国SRRC批准均不被NBTC认可，不可替代泰国型式批准。通常须委任境内授权代表或当地进口商申请并维持NBTC型式批准。NBTC频率分配总体与ITU建议接轨，但依据泰国法律独立执行。
summary.zht: 所有無線及無線電通訊設備——包括具有射頻能力的Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa及物聯網產品——在泰國進口或銷售前，須取得NBTC（國家廣播電信委員會）型式批准證書。該義務源於《無線電通訊法》BE 2498及《電信業務法》BE 2544。NBTC型式批准證書編號須以泰語標注於產品或包裝標籤上。CE標誌、FCC認證及中國SRRC批准均不被NBTC認可，不可替代泰國型式批准。通常須委任境內授權代表或當地進口商申請並維持NBTC型式批准。NBTC頻率分配總體與ITU建議接軌，但依據泰國法律獨立執行。

standards_or_laws: NBTC type approval procedures and notifications (NBTC, Thailand)

summary.en: China requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China, under MIIT) radio type approval for all radio transmitters sold in China, along with a MIIT network access license (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment with network access functions. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) may also apply to certain RF equipment categories. Approval is granted per MIIT/SRRC regulations and the assigned approval code must appear on the product label. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC applies in Thailand; both are domestic Chinese requirements not recognised by NBTC.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有在华销售的无线电发射设备取得SRRC（工业和信息化部下属国家无线电管理机构）无线电型式核准，具有网络接入功能的电信终端设备还须取得工业和信息化部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）亦可能适用于某些射频设备类别。批准依据工业和信息化部/SRRC法规授予，所授予的批准代码须标注于产品标签。SRRC批准和CCC均不适用于泰国，均为中国境内要求，不被NBTC认可。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有在華銷售的無線電發射設備取得SRRC（工業和信息化部下屬國家無線電管理機構）無線電型式核准，具有網路接入功能的電信終端設備還須取得工業和信息化部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）亦可能適用於某些射頻設備類別。批准依據工業和信息化部/SRRC法規授予，所授予的批准代碼須標注於產品標籤。SRRC批准和CCC均不適用於泰國，均為中國境內要求，不被NBTC認可。

standards_or_laws: Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China (SRRC / MIIT)
Telecommunications Regulations of the People's Republic of China (MIIT — NAL)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — for RF equipment categories in scope (CNCA)

gap.en: SRRC radio type approval and MIIT network access license (NAL) are domestic Chinese requirements and are not recognised by Thailand's NBTC. A separate NBTC type approval must be obtained for the Thai market before import or sale. The NBTC type approval certificate number must appear on a Thai-language product or packaging label. CE and FCC approvals are also not recognised. Local in-country agent designation is required for the NBTC application process. Common gap: Chinese-market products carry only SRRC/MIIT/CCC marks; all NBTC certification and Thai labelling must be completed separately before entry into the Thai market.
gap.zh: SRRC无线电型式核准和工业和信息化部网络接入许可（NAL）均为中国境内要求，不被泰国NBTC认可。须单独为泰国市场取得NBTC型式批准，方可进口或销售。NBTC型式批准证书编号须以泰语标注于产品或包装标签上。CE及FCC批准同样不被认可。申请NBTC须委任境内本地代理人。常见差距：面向中国市场的产品仅持有SRRC/MIIT/CCC标志，进入泰国市场前须单独完成所有NBTC认证及泰语标签要求。
gap.zht: SRRC無線電型式核准和工業和信息化部網路接入許可（NAL）均為中國境內要求，不被泰國NBTC認可。須單獨為泰國市場取得NBTC型式批准，方可進口或銷售。NBTC型式批准證書編號須以泰語標注於產品或包裝標籤上。CE及FCC批准同樣不被認可。申請NBTC須委任境內本地代理人。常見差距：面向中國市場的產品僅持有SRRC/MIIT/CCC標誌，進入泰國市場前須單獨完成所有NBTC認證及泰語標籤要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NBTC type approval required for all radio/wireless/telecom terminal equipment before import or sale in Thailand under the Radio Communications Act BE 2498 and Telecommunications Business Act BE 2544; NBTC certificate number required on Thai-language product label
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC (MIIT) radio type approval required for radio transmitters; MIIT network access license (NAL) required for telecom terminal equipment; CCC mandatory for in-scope categories; under MIIT and CNCA

source.publisher: National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC), Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NBTC type approval is mandatory for all wireless and RF-capable devices before import or sale in Thailand. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and MIIT-NAL approvals are not recognised by NBTC. A separate NBTC type approval application must be filed through a local authorised agent or importer. The NBTC certificate number must appear on a Thai-language label on the product or packaging. CE and FCC certifications provide no exemption.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所有无线及具有射频能力的设备在泰国进口或销售前，必须取得NBTC型式批准。中国的SRRC、CCC及MIIT网络接入许可不被NBTC认可。须通过当地授权代理人或进口商另行提交NBTC型式批准申请，NBTC证书编号须以泰语标注于产品或包装标签上。CE及FCC认证不提供豁免。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 所有無線及具有射頻能力的設備在泰國進口或銷售前，必須取得NBTC型式批准。中國的SRRC、CCC及MIIT網路接入許可不被NBTC認可。須通過當地授權代理人或進口商另行提交NBTC型式批准申請，NBTC證書編號須以泰語標注於產品或包裝標籤上。CE及FCC認證不提供豁免。
